The Ontology of Sound

Introduction

Sound sits at the intersection of physics, perception and signal processing. See the overview at this reference for context.1

A classic relation is the inline identity E=mc2E = mc^2E=mc² which connects energy and mass.2

∫01x2dx=13\int_0^1 x^2\,dx = \frac{1}{3}∫₀¹x²dx=⅓

Gemini's own inline form, e.g. a²+b²=c², keeps the LaTeX in a data-math attribute.2

fs≥2B

Key Properties

  • Frequency
    • Measured in hertz
    • Determines pitch
  • Amplitude

PropertyUnit
FrequencyHz
AmplitudedB
Sound is the vocabulary of nature.3

const f = 440; // A4 in Hz
